_comment: File ID mapping from book IDs to Google Drive file IDs
_note: This file maps OurLibrary book IDs to their corresponding Google Drive file IDs

_instructions.setup: To populate this file with real Google Drive file IDs:
_instructions.step1: Upload all PDF books to your 2TB Google Drive
_instructions.step2: Organize them in folders by category (Computer_Science, Mathematics, etc.)
_instructions.step3: Make the main folder public with 'Anyone with the link can view'
_instructions.step4: Use Google Drive API to get file IDs for each book
_instructions.step5: Map each book ID from the SQLite database to its Google Drive file ID
_instructions.example_script: A Python script can automate this process using the Google Drive API

_folder_structure.note: Organize by the 26 categories from your SQLite database
